reason: 答应 not in vocab; 回答 (target word) absent. 敲 not in vocab — revised: '有人来了，快去回答。'

old: Someone is knocking; go answer quickly.
new: Someone is here; go answer quickly.

old: 我在厨房，听见了就答应了。
new: 我在厨房，听见了就回答了。
reason: 答应 not in vocab; 回答 absent. 厨房 not in vocab — revised: '我在那里，听见了就回答了。'

old: I was in the kitchen and answered when I heard.
new: I was there and answered when I heard.

old: 河水跑得很急。
reason: 跑 (to run on foot) used for river flowing — unnatural phrasing. Correction: rivers 流 (flow), not 跑. However 流 is not in vocab either. Use: '河水动得很急。' — 动 is in vocab.

old: The river water flows very fast.
new: The river water moves very fast.

old: 城市的快速发展让人吃惊。
reason: Sentences use 快速 instead of 急 — target word absent. 经济/增长/吃惊 not in vocab. 发展 is in vocab but 急 is absent.

old: The rapid development of the city is surprising.
他的快速学习让老师高兴。
His rapid learning made the teacher happy.
经济快速增长。
reason: 经济/增长 not in vocab; 急 absent.

old: The economy is growing rapidly.
改善环境的需求越来越迫切。
reason: Sentences use 迫切 instead of 急 — target word absent. 改善/越来越/形势/进度/任务/紧迫/迫切 not in vocab.

old: The need to improve the environment is becoming increasingly pressing.
new: This matter is pressing and cannot wait.

old: 时间紧迫，任务迫切。
reason: 紧迫/迫切 not in vocab; 急 absent.

old: Time is tight and the task is pressing.
new: Time is pressing; let's go quickly.

old: 面对迫切的形势，他们加快了进度。
new: 这个问题很急，需要快点做。
reason: 迫切/形势/进度/面对/加快 not in vocab; 急 absent.

old: Facing a pressing situation, they sped up their progress.
new: This problem is pressing and needs to be done quickly.

old: 他的中文几乎很好。
reason: 几乎很好 is unnatural — 几乎 (nearly/almost) doesn't collocate well with 很好 (very good). Correct usage: 几乎 + verb or near-completion.

old: His Chinese is nearly very good.
new: He has nearly finished reading this book.

old: 他学中文将近三年了。
reason: Sentences use 将近 instead of 几乎 — target word absent.

old: He has been studying Chinese for nearly three years.
new: He has been studying Chinese for nearly three years.

old: 路上花了将近两个小时。
new: 路上花了几乎两个小时。
reason: 将近 used; 几乎 absent. 花 (to spend time/money) — 花 IS in vocab (花 = flower, but also used as verb 花时间; 花 is listed in vocab as 花).

old: It took nearly two hours on the road.
new: It took nearly two hours on the road.

old: 将近一半的学生通过了考试。
new: 几乎一半的学生通过了考试。
reason: 将近 used; 几乎 absent. 通过 not in vocab — revised: '几乎一半的学生考试很好。'

old: Nearly half of the students passed the exam.
new: Nearly half of the students did well on the exam.

old: 我认得他的声音。
reason: 认得 (to recognize) used instead of 记 (to remember) — wrong definition illustrated and target word absent.

old: I remember his voice.
你还认得我吗？
Do you still remember me?
我认得这个地方。
I remember this place.
老师检验了学生的学习成果。
new: 老师检查了学生的作业。
reason: 检验 used instead of 检查 — target word absent. 成果 not in vocab.

old: The teacher examined the students' learning outcomes.
new: The teacher examined the students' homework.

old: 考试是检验知识的一种方式。
new: 考试是检查学生的一种方式。
reason: 检验 used; 检查 absent. 知识/方式 not in vocab.

old: Exams are a way to examine knowledge.
new: Exams are a way to examine students.

old: 专家对材料的安全性进行了检验。
new: 他们检查了所有的东西。
reason: 专家/材料/安全性/进行 not in vocab; 检查 absent.

old: Experts examined the safety of the materials.
鹿的角很好看。
A deer's antlers are very beautiful.
new: That cow's horns are very big.

old: 他演了一个坏人的角。
new: 他在电影里演了一个坏人的角。
reason: 演 (to perform/act) not in vocab — revised to avoid 演: '他在电影里是一个坏人的角。'

old: He played the role of a villain character.
new: In the film, he plays the character of a villain.

old: 她喜欢这个角。
reason: No change needed — sentence is fine.

old: 她在电影里演什么角？
What role does she play in the film?
new: What role is she in the film?

old: 她的性格很好，大家都喜欢她。
reason: Sentences use 性格 instead of 角 — target word absent. 性格/诚实/勇敢 not in vocab.

old: Her character is very good; everyone likes her.
他的性格很诚实。
reason: 性格/诚实 not in vocab; 角 absent.

old: His character is very honest.
new: This character makes people like them.

old: 这个孩子的性格很勇敢。
reason: 性格/勇敢 not in vocab; 角 absent.

old: This child has a brave character.
new: Her character is a good person.

old: 请把这两根线接起来。
reason: 根 (measure word for thin long objects) not in vocab; 线 (wire/line) not in vocab.

old: Please connect these two wires together.
把电脑连到互联网上。
reason: 连 not in vocab; 互联网 not in vocab; target word 接 absent.

old: Connect the computer to the internet.
new: Connect the computer to the TV.

old: 这两个城市用高铁连起来了。
reason: 连 not in vocab; 接 absent.

old: These two cities are connected by high-speed rail.
new: Connect your phone to the computer.

old: 请把手机连到电视。
reason: 连 not in vocab; 接 absent.

old: Please connect your phone to the TV.
new: This road connects to that road.

old: 这条路沟通了东西两区。
reason: 沟通 not in vocab; 区 not in vocab (as district); 接 absent.

old: This road connects the eastern and western districts.
new: This road connects the eastern and western sides.

old: 网络沟通了世界各地。
reason: 沟通/网络/各地 not in vocab; 接 absent.

old: The internet connects people all over the world.
new: This one connects to that one.

old: 这座桥沟通了两边。
reason: 沟通 not in vocab; 接 absent. 座 not in vocab but used as measure — borderline; rewrite: '这个桥接了两边。'

old: This bridge connects both sides.
两条电线搭在一起了。
reason: 搭 not in vocab; 电线 not in vocab; 接 absent.

old: The two wires are connected together.
new: The two roads are connected together.

old: 他把电池搭上了电线。
reason: 搭/电线/电池 not in vocab; 接 absent.

old: He connected the battery to the wire.
new: He connected his phone to the computer.

old: 把这两端搭在一起就行。
new: 把这两个接在一起就行。
reason: 搭/端 not in vocab; 接 absent.

old: Just connect these two ends together.
报告已经截止，不能再修改了。
reason: 截止 not in vocab; 报告/修改 not in vocab; target word 结束 absent.

old: The report has concluded — it can no longer be revised.
比赛在昨晚截止。
reason: 截止 not in vocab; 结束 absent.

old: The competition concluded last night.
new: This song concluded the evening event.

old: 申请期限已截止。
reason: 截止/申请/期限 not in vocab; 结束 absent.

old: The application period has concluded.
new: Please conclude what you are saying.
